title: XdrLogRaider — Defender XDR Internal Telemetry
descriptionMarkdown:
Ingests Defender XDR portal-only telemetry (configuration, compliance, drift, exposure, governance, identity, action center, threat analytics) that is not exposed by public Microsoft Graph Security or Microsoft 365 Defender / MDE public APIs.

- **46 data streams** grouped into 5 cadence tiers (fast 10m, exposure 1h, config 6h, inventory 1d, maintenance 1w) + 1 operational stream (Heartbeat) = **47 custom tables**
- Per-stream typed columns at ingest via projection map; `RawJson` preserved alongside for forensic queries
- Drift detection via 4 tier parsers operating on typed-column bag (`pack_all() - metaCols`)
- 7 workbooks (incl. Action Center for Device Timeline + Machine Actions), 14 analytic rules (ship disabled per Microsoft Sentinel best practice), 9 hunting queries
- Auth chain diagnostics in App Insights `customEvents` (AuthChain.* event names)
- Unified Entra-layer auth (TOTP or Software Passkey) — single primitive for unattended production across all Microsoft 365 portals
- Multi-portal forward-compat foundation (Defender ships today; Entra, Purview, Intune planned)

See [repo README](https://github.com/akefallonitis/xdrlograider) for setup, deployment, permissions, and operator runbook.

graphQueries.baseQuery: MDE_Heartbeat_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | summarize count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)

sampleQueries.description: Recent auth chain events (App Insights customEvents)
sampleQueries.query: customEvents | where name in ('AuthChain.AADSTSError', 'AuthChain.Completed') | order by timestamp desc | take 10

sampleQueries.description: Heartbeat by tier, last 24h (including Rate429Count + GzipBytes from Notes)
sampleQueries.query: MDE_Heartbeat_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | extend n = parse_json(Notes) | project TimeGenerated, Tier, FunctionName, StreamsSucceeded, StreamsAttempted, RowsIngested, LatencyMs, Rate429Count = toint(n.rate429Count), GzipBytes = tolong(n.gzipBytes)

sampleQueries.description: Suppression rules modified in the last 24h
sampleQueries.query: MDE_SuppressionRules_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by EntityId | project TimeGenerated, EntityId, RawJson

value: MDE_Heartbeat_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h) | where StreamsSucceeded > 0 | project IsConnected = isnotempty(TimeGenerated)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: read and write permissions on the workspace

customs.name: Service account
customs.description: Dedicated read-only Entra service account with Security Reader + Defender XDR Analyst roles. Production auth: Credentials+TOTP or Software Passkey (both auto-refresh via Key Vault). DirectCookies is testing-only — not supported for unattended Function App deployment.

instructionSteps.title: Deploy the Function App
instructionSteps.description: Deploy the ARM template via the [Deploy to Azure](https://portal.azure.com/#create/Microsoft.Template/uri/https%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2Fakefallonitis%2Fxdrlograider%2Fmain%2Fdeploy%2Fcompiled%2FmainTemplate.json) button. Fill the wizard and wait ~10 minutes.

instructionSteps.title: Upload auth secrets to Key Vault
instructionSteps.description: After deployment, run the initialization script from your local machine:

instructionSteps.title: Confirm connector liveness
instructionSteps.description: Within 5-10 minutes the Function App's heartbeat timer + first poll fire. The connector card reads MDE_Heartbeat_CL for the IsConnected indicator. For auth chain diagnostics, query App Insights customEvents:

parameters.label: customEvents | where name in ('AuthChain.AADSTSError', 'AuthChain.Completed') | order by timestamp desc | take 10
